title: 2 Pack Necklace Hangers Acrylic Necklaces Holder Wall Mounted Jewellry Organiser Hanging with 12 Diamond Shape Hooks, Jewellry Hangers for Necklace, Gift for Girls Women
features: Package includes 2 Pack Necklace Holder. Overall dimensions are 34cm long by 3.5cm high. Each necklace holder has 12 individual diamond knobs. All your necklaces or bracelets can be completely organized and easily accessible in a fairly compact area. No need to search for a particular item in a jumbled box or untangle a mass of chains anymore.

CUTE and SPARKLE: Our clear jewellry holder is made of acrylic, this completely transparent design features shiny bright diamond shape hooks. This jewellry hanger enhances home décor well and adds glamorous elements to a bedroom or closet.

WIDELY APPLICATION: This hanging holder can be widely applied in closet, kitchen, bathroom, bedroom, living room, storage room, garage, workshop, and office, etc. Our self-adhesive wall hooks can be used for necklace holders, jewellry organizers, clothes hooks, tower hangers or for home organization to hang your scarves, purses, hats, handbags, shopping bags, pictures, wires, strings and more!
Installation of this necklace wall organizer is simple. It can be attached with 2 small nails or adhesive tapes. Each rack includes two nails and twelve clear adhesive tapes.
It is a great gift on holidays, birthdays etc. for friends or any person you need a gift for.
description: This necklace holder is made of high-quality acrylic material in transparent. Each rack contains 12 knobs with sparkling crystal ball shape. Tips for applying Adhesive Tapes: 1. Surfaces that are rough, peeled or water-stained are not good for applying adhesive Tape. Cement, wood, ceramic, metal, glass, latex and wallpaper surfaces are all suitable. 2. Please make sure the surface is thoroughly dry and clean before applying the adhesive tape. 3. Wait at least 24 hours before hanging jewellry or other accessories.. How to remove Adhesive Tapes: Use a heat gun or hair dryer to warm the taped surfaces. Heat just until the surface is hot to the touch. Then, peel the tape off the surface. Package includes: 2 * necklace hangers 2 * adhesive tapes 4 * nails
